raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding Citibanks handling of a disputed credit card charge for {$550.00} for travel booked through Citi XXXX on XX/XX/2025, for XXXX XXXX XXXX 

I booked accommodation at XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX, XXXX, through Citi XXXX. Upon arrival late at night in a foreign country with my two children, we were unable to enter the property because the required access code was never provided. We were locked out in the rain and unable to reach the property management despite multiple attempts. As a result, we were forced to travel across town and walk from hotel to hotel - again in the rain at night with two exhausted children- in order to book emergency lodging at another hotel for the night. 

The following day, after spending much of the day calling Citi five times, a Citi XXXX agent finally informed me that the property had actually sent the access instructions to Citi, but Citi did not forward them to me. When we eventually accessed the accommodation, however, it was materially misrepresented and uninhabitable, in poor conditions, dirty, and with a strong sewage smell, raising health and safety concerns. I documented this with photographs and notified Citi immediately before vacating the property. I was forced to find alternative accommodation twice in less than 24 hours of my trip.

Despite these facts, Citi has refused to issue a full refund, incorrectly treating this issue as a cancellation subject to the propertys cancellation policy, instead of material misrepresentation and breach of contract as I repeatedly informed them. Citi has also made it extremely difficult to escalate the issue despite multiple calls over two weeks. They never let me talk to a supervisor directly, instead assigning an unreachable supervisor based in XXXX, XXXX, at a ridiculous time difference from XXXX, who never contacted me despite multiple requests. Citi 's complete lack of urgency and basic customer service has forced me to spend weeks both during my trip and after trying to resolve this issue. 

I am requesting that Citibank properly review this matter as a failure to deliver the contracted service, issue a full refund for the accommodation, and address the lack of meaningful escalation and resolution.
